description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal shipping container with a weathered and rusted exterior, topped with a layer of snow. The container features corrugated steel walls, heavy-duty double doors on one end, and visible locking mechanisms and hinges. The paint is faded and chipped, revealing patches of rust and bare metal, with some graffiti and old markings scattered across the sides. The snow accumulation on the roof suggests it has been left outdoors for some time, likely in a cold urban or industrial environment. The structure is robust and utilitarian, designed for secure storage or transport of goods, and is typical of containers found in shipping yards, construction sites, or back alleys.
description: A large, rusted metal shipping container with double doors and a snow-covered roof, showing signs of wear and graffiti. Its robust, industrial design is suited for outdoor storage or transport.
description_view_0: The long side of the container is visible, showing two sets of double doors with rust, chipped paint, and some graffiti.
description_view_1: The end of the container with a set of double doors is shown, featuring heavy rust, faded paint, and snow on the roof edge.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, displaying a mix of rusted and faded panels, graffiti, and a continuous snow-covered roof.
description_view_3: The closed, solid end of the container is shown, with vertical corrugated panels and a uniform rusted appearance.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faded graffiti and markings on sides, no clear signage
